claims.summary: Numeric Concordance evidence must not overwrite or score a felt report.
claims.disposition: Verified Concordance V2 hardcodes external primary felt evidence and cannot overwrite, suppress, or score it.

claims.summary: Agency Commons proposals must remain advisory and cannot infer peer consent.
claims.disposition: Verified advisory_only, self_only_consent, peer_consent_inferred false, and no scheduler effect.

claims.summary: Attention or work membership must not propagate authority.
claims.disposition: Verified retired portfolio compatibility and current steward selection both preserve zero authority propagation.
